headline: Assurant Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
summary: AIZ's Q1 earnings are likely to have benefited from Global Housing strength and Lifestyle growth, with rising premiums and investment income offset partly by higher expenses.

headline: Exploring Analyst Estimates for MetLife (MET) Q1 Earnings, Beyond Revenue and EPS
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for MetLife (MET), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: MetLife (MET) Is Up 5.3% After Lifting Its Quarterly Dividend 4.4% - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: MetLife, Inc. recently announced that its board approved a second-quarter 2026 common stock dividend of US$0.5925 per share, up 4.4% from the prior quarter and payable on June 9, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 12, 2026. This increase extends a long-running pattern of dividend growth since 2011 and highlights management’s emphasis on consistent cash returns to shareholders. We’ll now examine how this latest dividend increase, and the signal it sends about capital priorities, informs...
